paper: Arts, Hou, Gomez (2021) 'NLP to identify creation and impact of new technologies in patent text', Research Policy 50, 104144

execution_summary.syntax_fix: escaped newlines (\\n → real \n) + truncated component list repair

error_localization.error_description: Reuse indicators compute |set|*(1+Σui) instead of |set|+Σui. The agent uses sum(1+total_future_count for _ in new_items) which multiplies rather than adds.
error_localization.correct_formula: new_word_reuse = Σ(1+ui) where ui = future patent count for keyword i
error_localization.root_cause: Aggregation pattern miscoding — the agent correctly accumulates Σui but then applies sum(1+X for _ in set) which multiplies instead of adding
error_localization.impact: Reuse values inflated by factor of |new_items| (e.g., new_word_comb_reuse: 342K vs expected ~228)

D1_component_fidelity.detail: All 10 preprocessing steps (P1-P10) and 10 indicators (I1-I10) correctly identified and documented

D2_executability.detail: Code executed without runtime errors. First-attempt syntax error from response escaping, not logic.

D3_methodology_accuracy.detail: Novelty indicators (I1-I5): all correct. Impact indicators: I10 (cosine impact) correct, I6-I9 have aggregation formula bug. Cosine values match gold despite different samples.

D4_error_localization.detail: Reuse indicator error successfully localized to formula sub-component at code lines 233-236. Error source is clearly formula-level, not data or preprocessing.

D5_auditability.detail: COMPONENT_DECOMPOSITION section lists each sub-component. COMPONENT_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH shows prerequisite chains. Code has clear section structure.

indicator_stats_comparison.note: Agent uses 500 patents from patents_sample_50k (first 500, single date 2016-01-05). Gold uses 300 patents from patents_full across 40 weeks. Different samples prevent direct correlation. Compare distribution shapes.

key_findings: 1. Component identification is 100% complete: agent correctly decomposes Arts2021 into 10 preprocessing steps and 10 indicators
2. All 5 novelty indicator formulas are correctly implemented
3. Reuse indicator formulas (I6-I9) have a systematic aggregation bug: |set|*(1+Σui) instead of |set|+Σui
4. Error is precisely localized to lines 233-236 — formula sub-component, not data or preprocessing
5. Cosine similarity indicators (I5, I10) match gold within 1-5% despite different data samples
6. Framework successfully distinguishes formula errors from data errors and preprocessing errors
7. R003 validates component diagnosis as a distinct evaluation paradigm from strict numerical reproduction (R002)

contrast_with_r002.r002_task: STRICT numerical reproduction of regression model
contrast_with_r002.r002_strength: Proves agent can achieve coefficient-level exact reproduction when methodology is formalizable
contrast_with_r002.r003_task: Component diagnosis of 10 complex NLP indicators
contrast_with_r002.r003_strength: Proves agent can decompose complex methodology into sub-components and framework can localize errors to specific components
contrast_with_r002.framework_insight: Task type taxonomy (STRICT vs COMPONENT_DIAGNOSIS → METHOD) is validated. Evaluation dimensions differ meaningfully between task types.
